title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!
